message:
chore(beads): update issue tracking with install/uninstall task status changes

Sync beads issue state to reflect completed work on the installer
infrastructure: MCP config setup tasks, uninstall mode tasks,
Windows installer tasks, and fresh-install e2e test tasks. Updates
status fields, closed_at timestamps, and dependency metadata for
the install track issue tree.
